Summary 
Palliative care is treatment of the discomfort, symptoms, and stress of serious illness. It provides relief from distressing symptoms including:
Pain 
Shortness of breath 
Fatigue 
Constipation 
Nausea 
Loss of appetite 
Problems with sleep
